null_expectations.note: Expected exceedance fractions if the climate matched the 1991-2020 baseline. Counts above these are the anomaly signal; counts near them are the base rate.

validation.note: Searched news + weather archives for Delhi 9 Oct 2023 heat; Oct 2023 monthly max ~35.4°C but nothing confirms ~36.5°C on that date. No contradiction.
Skymet reported Delhi's coldest morning of the season at 10.4°C on 10 Nov 2025, consistent with the flagged ~10.7°C on 11 Nov.
Weather Spark logs a thunderstorm with rain at Delhi IGI on 2 Mar 2024; Deccan Herald reports a Delhi-NCR hailstorm on 3 Mar 2024 (unseasonal March rain).
